name: Tucson Jailhouse Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Pinto or kidney beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice onion; sauté in a heavy Dutch oven.
2. Dice garlic and add to the onions when they are clear.
3. Stir for 30 seconds, then add ground beef, green chilies, jalapeno peppers, diced tomatoes, tomato paste, chili powder, cumin, vinegar, brown sugar, oil, and drained beans.
4. Simmer for 1 ½ to 2 hours (do not boil). Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Garnish with grated sharp Cheddar cheese and sliced green onions.
6. Serve with corn chips.
